title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vishal Mega Mart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vishal Mega Mart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!
